nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous content producer
nodes.grounding_span: I work collaboratively with the AI, and ask it for inspiration at times, while also providing it with existing content to refine or expand

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for content creation
nodes.label_negative: AI use for development and technical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly use AI for online content production with my work

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.grounding_span: I perhaps feel that by asking AI to help me with these I may start to get 'rusty' and my skills might diminish somewhat

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: it does help make things easier at times, to give me more time to myself

nodes.label: Workplace acceptance of AI use
nodes.label_negative: AI viewed as cheating in workplace
nodes.grounding_span: I think they would almost view using AI as cheating

nodes.label: Creative control and originality
nodes.grounding_span: I will take the content created by the AI and then go over it myself, sometimes changing it quite a bit

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I always prefer to handle these myself, although I know AI could help

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it did bring the company several new sales, and a lot of attention from existing customers

nodes.label: Career advancement and relevance
nodes.grounding_span: the skills I have developed with AI in recent times, will be of great use to the company as a whole

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for campaign planning
nodes.grounding_span: I was particularly pleased with this as it did bring the company several new sales

nodes.label: Concern about skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: I may start to get 'rusty' and my skills might diminish somewhat

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I think as we move forward, I will continue to use AI in the way that I am doing, but the results will get better

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: There can be quite a bit of back and forth with the AI after this, as I try to perfect the content

nodes.label: Domain-specific delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: I always prefer to handle these myself, although I know AI could help
